title: CLI --permission-mode acceptEdits vs project defaultMode plan -> CLI wins (Write to cwd auto-approved)

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P7-settings-scope-precedence/d-cli-over-project/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.
probes.result_text: Done. File created at `$REPO/cases/P7-settings-scope-precedence/d-cli-over-project/PROOF.txt` with content `ok`.

hypothesis: CLI 引数は project settings に勝つ(precedence managed>CLI>local>project>user)。--permission-mode acceptEdits が project の defaultMode: plan を上書きし、cwd への Write は自動承認され ✅。対照: settings の plan 単独なら Write は ask(P1-c/P1-i)、CLI acceptEdits 単独なら allow(P1-b)— 併置して allow になれば CLI > project が立つ。SDK は flags→options 機械変換(permissionMode=acceptEdits)で options のモードが適用されるため byModality 不要(P1-i: モードは options から)。
